 {"id":"bd-3jd9","title":"acfs export-config: Export current config command","description":"## Overview
Add `acfs export-config` command to export current ACFS configuration for backup or migration to another machine.

## Use Cases
- Backup before reinstall
- Share config with teammates
- Migrate to new VPS
- Version control your setup

## Export Format
```yaml
# acfs-config-export.yaml
# Generated: 2026-01-25T23:00:00Z
# Hostname: my-vps
# ACFS Version: 1.0.0

modules:
  - core
  - dev
  - shell

tools:
  rust: { version: "1.79.0", installed: true }
  bun: { version: "1.1.38", installed: true }
  zoxide: { version: "0.9.4", installed: true }

settings:
  shell: zsh
  editor: nvim
  theme: dark
```

## Commands
```bash
acfs export-config                    # Print to stdout
acfs export-config > my-config.yaml   # Save to file
acfs export-config --json             # JSON format
acfs export-config --minimal          # Just module list
```

## Import (Future)
```bash
# Future enhancement (not in this bead)
acfs import-config my-config.yaml
```

## Implementation Details
1. Read current state.json
2. Query installed tool versions
3. Format as YAML or JSON
4. Add metadata (timestamp, hostname, version)
5. Exclude sensitive data (tokens, keys)

## Sensitive Data Handling
- NEVER export: SSH keys, API tokens, passwords
- NEVER export: Full paths containing username
- DO export: Tool selections, versions, preferences

## Test Plan
- [ ] Test YAML output is valid
- [ ] Test JSON output is valid
- [ ] Test no sensitive data in output
- [ ] Test --minimal output
- [ ] Test output on fresh install

## Files to Create

 {"id":"bd-3kug","title":"Deep exploration: BV (Beads Viewer)","description":"## Goal
Perform deep exploration of BV (Beads Viewer) and revise its description with comprehensive testing.

## Phase 0: Pre-flight Verification

```bash
#!/bin/bash
LOG=/tmp/bv-preflight.log
echo "=== BV Pre-flight ===" | tee $LOG

[[ -d /dp/beads_viewer ]] && echo "PASS: Directory exists" || exit 1
command -v bv &>/dev/null && echo "PASS: bv installed" || echo "WARN: bv not in PATH"
bv --version 2>&1 | tee -a $LOG

SNAPSHOT_DIR=/tmp/bv-exploration-snapshots
mkdir -p $SNAPSHOT_DIR
cp /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts $SNAPSHOT_DIR/flywheel.ts.before
cp /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web/lib/tldr-content.ts $SNAPSHOT_DIR/tldr-content.ts.before
```

## Phase 1: Research

### 1.1 Documentation
- cat /dp/beads_viewer/README.md
- Check AGENTS.md if exists

### 1.2 Code Investigation
- Graph algorithms: PageRank, Betweenness, HITS, Eigenvector
- Robot modes: --robot-triage, --robot-suggest, --robot-insights, --robot-next
- How it reads br/bd JSONL data
- Output JSON schemas
- Critical path computation

### 1.3 Verify Algorithms
```bash
#!/bin/bash
echo "=== BV Algorithm Verification ==="
bv --robot-triage 2>&1 | jq '.triage.recommendations[0].breakdown.pagerank' && echo "PASS: PageRank" || echo "FAIL"
bv --robot-triage 2>&1 | jq '.triage.recommendations[0].breakdown.betweenness' && echo "PASS: Betweenness" || echo "FAIL"
bv --robot-triage >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "PASS: --robot-triage" || echo "FAIL"
bv --robot-suggest >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "PASS: --robot-suggest" || echo "FAIL"
bv --robot-insights >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "PASS: --robot-insights" || echo "FAIL"
```

### 1.4 External Context
- /xf search 'bv OR beads_viewer'
- cass search 'bv triage pagerank' --robot --limit 10

## Phase 2: Analysis

Document with VERIFICATION:
- [ ] PageRank: VERIFIED working
- [ ] Betweenness: VERIFIED working
- [ ] HITS: VERIFIED working
- [ ] Eigenvector: VERIFIED working
- [ ] Robot modes: list VERIFIED working modes
- [ ] Tech stack: ACTUAL language (Rust)
- [ ] Synergies VERIFIED:
  - [ ] br: reads JSONL from br
  - [ ] mail: any integration?
  - [ ] ntm: any integration?

## Phase 3: Revision

Update with VERIFIED capabilities only:
- Only list algorithms that actually work
- Only list robot modes that are implemented
- Only list synergies that exist

## Phase 4: Testing

```bash
cd /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web
bun run type-check 2>&1 | tee /tmp/bv-typecheck.log
bun run lint 2>&1 | tee /tmp/bv-lint.log
bun run build 2>&1 | tee /tmp/bv-build.log

# E2E
lsof -t -i :3000 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; sleep 2
bun run dev &
sleep 10
curl -sL http://localhost:3000/flywheel | grep -qi 'bv' && echo "PASS" || echo "FAIL"
curl -sL http://localhost:3000/tldr | grep -qi 'bv' && echo "PASS" || echo "FAIL"
kill %1
```

## Phase 5: Commit

```bash
git add apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts apps/web/lib/tldr-content.ts
git commit -m "docs(flywheel): update BV with verified graph algorithms

- Verified PageRank, Betweenness, HITS implementations
- Verified robot mode commands
- Tested against actual bv output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>"

br update bd-3kug --status closed
br sync --flush-only && git add .beads/ && git push
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All graph algorithms VERIFIED
- [ ] All robot modes VERIFIED
- [ ] Tech stack VERIFIED
- [ ] All tests PASS

 {"id":"bd-3ljs","title":"Deep exploration: NTM (Named Tmux Manager)","description":"## Goal
Perform deep exploration of NTM (Named Tmux Manager) and revise its description on the flywheel/TLDR pages with comprehensive testing and validation.

## Phase 0: Pre-flight Verification (CRITICAL)

### 0.1 Tool Existence Check
```bash
#!/bin/bash
LOG=/tmp/ntm-preflight.log
echo "=== NTM Pre-flight Check: $(date) ===" | tee $LOG

# Verify tool directory exists
if [[ -d /dp/ntm ]]; then
  echo "PASS: /dp/ntm directory exists" | tee -a $LOG
else
  echo "FAIL: /dp/ntm directory NOT FOUND - aborting" | tee -a $LOG
  exit 1
fi

# Verify README exists
if [[ -f /dp/ntm/README.md ]]; then
  echo "PASS: README.md exists" | tee -a $LOG
else
  echo "WARN: README.md not found" | tee -a $LOG
fi

# Verify tool is installed and executable
if command -v ntm &>/dev/null; then
  echo "PASS: ntm command available: $(which ntm)" | tee -a $LOG
  ntm --version 2>&1 | tee -a $LOG || echo "No --version flag" | tee -a $LOG
else
  echo "WARN: ntm command not in PATH" | tee -a $LOG
fi
```

### 0.2 Content Snapshot (BEFORE State)
```bash
#!/bin/bash
SNAPSHOT_DIR=/tmp/ntm-exploration-snapshots
mkdir -p $SNAPSHOT_DIR

# Capture current state for diff comparison later
cp /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts $SNAPSHOT_DIR/flywheel.ts.before
cp /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web/lib/tldr-content.ts $SNAPSHOT_DIR/tldr-content.ts.before

# Extract current NTM entry from flywheel.ts for reference
grep -A 100 "id: 'ntm'" /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts | head -100 > $SNAPSHOT_DIR/ntm-flywheel-entry.before.txt

echo "Snapshots saved to $SNAPSHOT_DIR"
ls -la $SNAPSHOT_DIR
```

### 0.3 Verify TypeScript Interfaces
```bash
# Check the FlywheelTool interface we must conform to
grep -A 30 "export interface FlywheelTool" /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts
grep -A 30 "export interface TldrFlywheelTool" /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web/lib/tldr-content.ts
```

## Phase 1: Research (GATHER CONTEXT)

### 1.1 Primary Documentation
```bash
# Read full README with line count for reference
wc -l /dp/ntm/README.md
cat /dp/ntm/README.md

# Check for additional docs
ls -la /dp/ntm/docs/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No docs/ directory"
cat /dp/ntm/AGENTS.md 2>/dev/null || echo "No AGENTS.md"
cat /dp/ntm/CONTRIBUTING.md 2>/dev/null || echo "No CONTRIBUTING.md"
```

### 1.2 Code Investigation
- Launch code investigation agent to understand:
  - Architecture and key files (main entry point, core modules)
  - Tmux session naming and management logic
  - How it spawns and tracks agent sessions
  - Integration points with other flywheel tools
  - Key CLI commands: `ntm spawn`, `ntm list`, `ntm kill`, `ntm attach`
  - Configuration files and defaults

### 1.3 External Context Search
```bash
# Twitter archive search
/xf search 'ntm OR "named tmux manager" OR "tmux session"' 2>&1 | head -50

# Past agent session insights  
cass search 'ntm tmux spawn' --robot --limit 10 2>&1

# Look for practical use cases
cass search 'ntm workflow' --robot --limit 5 2>&1
```

### 1.4 Project State Review
```bash
# Check beads
ls -la /dp/ntm/.beads/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No .beads directory"
br list 2>/dev/null | grep -i ntm || echo "No ntm-related beads found"

# Recent commits
cd /dp/ntm && git log --oneline -20 && cd -

# Any plan documents
find /dp/ntm -name "*.md" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -10
```

### 1.5 CLI Command Inventory
```bash
# Get actual CLI help
ntm --help 2>&1 || echo "ntm --help failed"
ntm help 2>&1 || echo "ntm help failed"

# List actual subcommands available
ntm 2>&1 | head -30
```

## Phase 2: Analysis (SYNTHESIZE UNDERSTANDING)

Document findings for each area (fill in during research):
- [ ] Core functionality: [describe tmux session management]
- [ ] Key commands verified working: [list commands tested]
- [ ] Synergies VERIFIED (not assumed):
  - [ ] mail: [how does ntm use mail? does it?]
  - [ ] caam: [how does ntm use caam for account switching?]  
  - [ ] slb: [any slb integration?]
  - [ ] srps: [resource protection integration?]
  - [ ] ru: [repo update integration?]
- [ ] Tech stack verified: [language, dependencies]
- [ ] Performance characteristics: [startup time, memory usage]
- [ ] Known limitations discovered: [list any]

## Phase 3: Revision (UPDATE DESCRIPTIONS)

### 3.1 Update apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts
Update the ntm entry ensuring TypeScript interface compliance:
```typescript
// Required fields per FlywheelTool interface:
{
  id: 'ntm',           // must be lowercase, unique
  name: string,             // full name
  shortName: string,        // abbreviated
  href: string,             // valid URL or path
  icon: LucideIcon,         // must be valid Lucide icon
  color: string,            // valid Tailwind color
  tagline: string,          // concise (<80 chars)
  description: string,      // 1-2 sentences
  deepDescription: string,  // detailed explanation
  connectsTo: string[],     // VERIFIED synergy IDs only
  connectionDescriptions: Record<string, string>,  // must match connectsTo
  stars: number,            // GitHub stars
  features: string[],       // VERIFIED features only
  cliCommands: { command: string; description: string }[],  // TESTED commands
  installCommand: string,   // working install command
  language: string,         // actual language
}
```

### 3.2 Update apps/web/lib/tldr-content.ts  
Update ensuring TldrFlywheelTool interface compliance:
```typescript
{
  id: 'ntm',
  name: string,
  shortName: string,
  href: string,
  icon: LucideIcon,
  color: string,
  category: 'core' | 'supporting',
  stars: number,
  whatItDoes: string,          // clear, accurate
  whyItsUseful: string,        // real value proposition
  implementationHighlights: string[],  // verified technical details
  synergies: string[],         // VERIFIED connections only
  techStack: string[],         // actual technologies
  keyFeatures: string[],       // verified features
  useCases: string[],          // realistic scenarios
}
```

### 3.3 Cross-reference Validation
```bash
# After updating NTM synergies, verify reciprocal connections exist
# If NTM lists "caam" in connectsTo, then caam entry must list "ntm"
SYNERGIES=$(grep -A5 "id: 'ntm'" /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts | grep -o "connectsTo.*" | head -1)
echo "NTM synergies: $SYNERGIES"

# Check each synergy has reciprocal
for tool in caam mail slb; do
  if grep -A10 "id: '$tool'" /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts | grep -q "ntm"; then
    echo "PASS: $tool lists ntm as synergy"
  else
    echo "WARN: $tool does NOT list ntm - may need update"
  fi
done
```

### 3.4 De-slopify
- Run `/de-slopify` on all revised descriptions
- Remove: "harness", "empower", "leverage", "robust", "seamless", "cutting-edge"
- Ensure authentic, technically accurate voice
- Verify no placeholder text remains

## Phase 4: Testing (VERIFY QUALITY)

### 4.1 Static Analysis
```bash
#!/bin/bash
LOG=/tmp/ntm-static-analysis.log
echo "=== NTM Static Analysis: $(date) ===" | tee $LOG

cd /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web

echo "--- Type Check ---" | tee -a $LOG
bun run type-check 2>&1 | tee -a $LOG
TYPE_EXIT=$?
echo "Type Check Exit Code: $TYPE_EXIT" | tee -a $LOG

echo "--- Lint Check ---" | tee -a $LOG  
bun run lint 2>&1 | tee -a $LOG
LINT_EXIT=$?
echo "Lint Exit Code: $LINT_EXIT" | tee -a $LOG

if [[ $TYPE_EXIT -ne 0 ]] || [[ $LINT_EXIT -ne 0 ]]; then
  echo "FAIL: Static analysis failed - DO NOT PROCEED" | tee -a $LOG
  exit 1
fi
echo "PASS: Static analysis succeeded" | tee -a $LOG
```

### 4.2 Build Verification
```bash
#!/bin/bash
LOG=/tmp/ntm-build.log
echo "=== NTM Build Test: $(date) ===" | tee $LOG

cd /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web
bun run build 2>&1 | tee -a $LOG
BUILD_EXIT=$?
echo "Build Exit Code: $BUILD_EXIT" | tee -a $LOG

if [[ $BUILD_EXIT -ne 0 ]]; then
  echo "FAIL: Build failed - ROLLBACK REQUIRED" | tee -a $LOG
  echo "Restoring from snapshot..." | tee -a $LOG
  cp /tmp/ntm-exploration-snapshots/flywheel.ts.before lib/flywheel.ts
  cp /tmp/ntm-exploration-snapshots/tldr-content.ts.before lib/tldr-content.ts
  exit 1
fi
echo "PASS: Build succeeded" | tee -a $LOG
```

### 4.3 E2E Visual Verification
```bash
#!/bin/bash
LOG=/tmp/ntm-e2e.log
echo "=== NTM E2E Test: $(date) ===" | tee $LOG

cd /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web

# Check if port 3000 is already in use
if lsof -i :3000 &>/dev/null; then
  echo "WARN: Port 3000 already in use, killing existing process" | tee -a $LOG
  kill $(lsof -t -i :3000) 2>/dev/null
  sleep 2
fi

# Start dev server
bun run dev &
DEV_PID=$!
echo "Dev server PID: $DEV_PID" | tee -a $LOG

# Wait for server to be ready (with timeout)
echo "Waiting for server..." | tee -a $LOG
for i in {1..30}; do
  if curl -s --max-time 2 http://localhost:3000 &>/dev/null; then
    echo "Server ready after ${i}s" | tee -a $LOG
    break
  fi
  sleep 1
done

# Test flywheel page
echo "--- Testing /flywheel ---" | tee -a $LOG
FLYWHEEL_RESP=$(curl -sL --max-time 10 http://localhost:3000/flywheel 2>&1)
if echo "$FLYWHEEL_RESP" | grep -qi 'ntm'; then
  echo "PASS: NTM found on /flywheel" | tee -a $LOG
else
  echo "FAIL: NTM not found on /flywheel" | tee -a $LOG
fi

# Test tldr page
echo "--- Testing /tldr ---" | tee -a $LOG
TLDR_RESP=$(curl -sL --max-time 10 http://localhost:3000/tldr 2>&1)
if echo "$TLDR_RESP" | grep -qi 'ntm'; then
  echo "PASS: NTM found on /tldr" | tee -a $LOG
else
  echo "FAIL: NTM not found on /tldr" | tee -a $LOG
fi

# Check for console errors (look in dev server output)
echo "--- Checking for errors ---" | tee -a $LOG
if echo "$FLYWHEEL_RESP" | grep -qi 'error\|exception'; then
  echo "WARN: Possible errors detected in response" | tee -a $LOG
fi

# Cleanup
kill $DEV_PID 2>/dev/null
echo "=== E2E Complete ===" | tee -a $LOG
```

### 4.4 Unit Tests: Content Integrity
```bash
#!/bin/bash
LOG=/tmp/ntm-unit-tests.log
echo "=== NTM Content Unit Tests: $(date) ===" | tee $LOG

cd /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web

# Test 1: NTM entry exists in flywheel.ts
echo "Test 1: NTM entry exists in flywheel.ts" | tee -a $LOG
if grep -q "id: 'ntm'" lib/flywheel.ts; then
  echo "  PASS" | tee -a $LOG
else
  echo "  FAIL: ntm entry not found" | tee -a $LOG
fi

# Test 2: Required fields are non-empty
echo "Test 2: Required fields non-empty" | tee -a $LOG
NTM_ENTRY=$(grep -A 50 "id: 'ntm'" lib/flywheel.ts | head -50)
for field in tagline description deepDescription; do
  if echo "$NTM_ENTRY" | grep -q "$field: '[^']\+'"; then
    echo "  PASS: $field is non-empty" | tee -a $LOG
  else
    echo "  WARN: $field may be empty" | tee -a $LOG
  fi
done

# Test 3: connectsTo and connectionDescriptions match
echo "Test 3: Synergy consistency" | tee -a $LOG
CONNECTS=$(echo "$NTM_ENTRY" | grep -o "connectsTo: \[.*\]" | head -1)
echo "  connectsTo: $CONNECTS" | tee -a $LOG

# Test 4: cliCommands have both command and description
echo "Test 4: CLI commands complete" | tee -a $LOG
if echo "$NTM_ENTRY" | grep -q "cliCommands:"; then
  echo "  PASS: cliCommands field exists" | tee -a $LOG
else
  echo "  FAIL: cliCommands missing" | tee -a $LOG
fi

# Test 5: NTM in tldr-content.ts
echo "Test 5: NTM in tldr-content.ts" | tee -a $LOG
if grep -q "id: 'ntm'" lib/tldr-content.ts; then
  echo "  PASS: NTM in tldr-content.ts" | tee -a $LOG
else
  echo "  FAIL: NTM not in tldr-content.ts" | tee -a $LOG
fi

# Test 6: Diff from original (should have changes)
echo "Test 6: Content actually changed" | tee -a $LOG
if diff -q lib/flywheel.ts /tmp/ntm-exploration-snapshots/flywheel.ts.before &>/dev/null; then
  echo "  WARN: flywheel.ts unchanged - was update applied?" | tee -a $LOG
else
  echo "  PASS: flywheel.ts has changes" | tee -a $LOG
  diff --brief lib/flywheel.ts /tmp/ntm-exploration-snapshots/flywheel.ts.before | tee -a $LOG
fi

echo "=== Unit Tests Complete ===" | tee -a $LOG
```

### 4.5 CLI Command Verification
```bash
#!/bin/bash
LOG=/tmp/ntm-cli-tests.log
echo "=== NTM CLI Command Tests: $(date) ===" | tee $LOG

# Test each CLI command mentioned in the updated content

echo "Exit code: $?" | tee -a $LOG

echo "=== CLI Tests Complete ===" | tee -a $LOG
```

### 4.6 Consolidated Test Results Log
```bash
#!/bin/bash
RESULTS=/tmp/ntm-exploration-test-results.log
echo "=============================================" > $RESULTS
echo "  NTM DEEP EXPLORATION TEST RESULTS" >> $RESULTS  
echo "=============================================" >> $RESULTS
echo "Date: $(date)" >> $RESULTS
echo "Agent: $(whoami)" >> $RESULTS
echo "" >> $RESULTS

echo "=== PRE-FLIGHT ===" >> $RESULTS
cat /tmp/ntm-preflight.log >> $RESULTS 2>/dev/null || echo "No preflight log" >> $RESULTS
echo "" >> $RESULTS

echo "=== STATIC ANALYSIS ===" >> $RESULTS
grep -E "PASS|FAIL|Exit Code" /tmp/ntm-static-analysis.log >> $RESULTS 2>/dev/null
echo "" >> $RESULTS

echo "=== BUILD ===" >> $RESULTS
grep -E "PASS|FAIL|Exit Code" /tmp/ntm-build.log >> $RESULTS 2>/dev/null
echo "" >> $RESULTS

echo "=== E2E ===" >> $RESULTS
grep -E "PASS|FAIL|WARN" /tmp/ntm-e2e.log >> $RESULTS 2>/dev/null
echo "" >> $RESULTS

echo "=== UNIT TESTS ===" >> $RESULTS
grep -E "PASS|FAIL|WARN" /tmp/ntm-unit-tests.log >> $RESULTS 2>/dev/null
echo "" >> $RESULTS

echo "=== CLI TESTS ===" >> $RESULTS
grep -E "Exit code" /tmp/ntm-cli-tests.log >> $RESULTS 2>/dev/null
echo "" >> $RESULTS

echo "=== CONTENT DIFF ===" >> $RESULTS
diff /tmp/ntm-exploration-snapshots/flywheel.ts.before /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts >> $RESULTS 2>/dev/null | head -50
echo "" >> $RESULTS

echo "=============================================" >> $RESULTS
echo "  SUMMARY" >> $RESULTS
echo "=============================================" >> $RESULTS
PASS_COUNT=$(grep -c "PASS" $RESULTS)
FAIL_COUNT=$(grep -c "FAIL" $RESULTS)
WARN_COUNT=$(grep -c "WARN" $RESULTS)
echo "PASS: $PASS_COUNT" >> $RESULTS
echo "FAIL: $FAIL_COUNT" >> $RESULTS
echo "WARN: $WARN_COUNT" >> $RESULTS

if [[ $FAIL_COUNT -gt 0 ]]; then
  echo "" >> $RESULTS
  echo "!!! FAILURES DETECTED - DO NOT COMMIT !!!" >> $RESULTS
fi

cat $RESULTS
```

## Phase 5: Commit (FINALIZE)

### 5.1 Pre-commit Validation
```bash
# Only proceed if all tests pass
FAIL_COUNT=$(grep -c "FAIL" /tmp/ntm-exploration-test-results.log)
if [[ $FAIL_COUNT -gt 0 ]]; then
  echo "ABORT: $FAIL_COUNT failures detected"
  echo "Review /tmp/ntm-exploration-test-results.log"
  exit 1
fi
```

### 5.2 Stage and Commit
```bash
cd /data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
git add apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts apps/web/lib/tldr-content.ts
git diff --cached --stat  # Review what is being committed

git commit -m "docs(flywheel): update NTM descriptions with verified, accurate content

Research completed:
- Read /dp/ntm/README.md and source code
- Verified CLI commands work: ntm list, ntm spawn, etc.
- Searched cass and xf for usage patterns
- Reviewed project beads and recent commits

Content updates:
- Updated tagline, description, and deepDescription
- Verified all CLI commands work correctly  
- Updated synergies based on ACTUAL integrations (not assumed)
- Verified reciprocal synergies exist
- Passed type-check, lint, and build verification

Test results: /tmp/ntm-exploration-test-results.log

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>"
```

### 5.3 Update Beads and Push
```bash
br update bd-3ljs --status closed
br sync --flush-only
git add .beads/
git commit -m "chore(beads): mark NTM exploration complete"
git push
```

### 5.4 Rollback Procedure (if needed)
```bash
# If issues discovered after commit:
git revert HEAD~2  # Revert both commits
# OR restore from snapshot:
cp /tmp/ntm-exploration-snapshots/flywheel.ts.before apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts
cp /tmp/ntm-exploration-snapshots/tldr-content.ts.before apps/web/lib/tldr-content.ts
git add . && git commit -m "revert: rollback NTM exploration changes"
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Pre-flight verification passed (tool exists, is installed)
- [ ] Content snapshot captured for rollback capability  
- [ ] All Phase 4 tests pass (type-check, lint, build, E2E, unit tests, CLI)
- [ ] ZERO failures in test results log
- [ ] No type errors or lint warnings introduced
- [ ] Build succeeds without errors
- [ ] Both /flywheel and /tldr pages render correctly with NTM entry
- [ ] All CLI commands listed are VERIFIED working
- [ ] All synergies are VERIFIED (not assumed)
- [ ] Reciprocal synergies confirmed in connected tools
- [ ] Content de-slopified
- [ ] Changes committed with detailed message
- [ ] Changes pushed to remote
- [ ] Bead marked closed
